title: Adding to Lists
description: Learn to use append() to add items to your lists dynamically.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Now that you know how to create lists, let's learn how to add items to them!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Can I add items after creating the list?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Absolutely! The append() method adds an item to the end of your list. If you have [1, 2] and append 3, you get [1, 2, 3]!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Let's try it! Create an empty list, then use append() to add a number. The syntax is: append(myList, 5)

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can start with an empty list and fill it up as I go?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is perfect for tracking harvests as they happen. Try it now!

objectives.description: Use append() to add an item

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Perfect! You've added your first item to a list dynamically!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: This is so useful! I can keep adding items as I farm!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: You can append as many items as you want! Each append() adds one more item to the end of your list.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Here's a real-world use case: harvest wheat 3 times, and after each harvest, append the amount to a list!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I'll have a record of every harvest I make!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Precisely! This is how professional programmers track data over time.

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! You've mastered append(). Next, we'll learn how to remove items from lists!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I'm ready for the next challenge!
